subject: URGENT ISSUE
body: I cannot access my billing portal, and my marketing campaign is going live in 1 hour. Fix this or I cancel. Also, I need to know the price for upgrading to enterprise.

subject: Spam or Inquiry?
body: Your service is great but I got a weird email from support@triagemaster.co. Is this you? Also, do you guys have a referral program or discount code?
